zh.Burton with Coates, Fittleworth, Sussex,: 英國英格蘭素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Goring III於1448年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特伯頓時，他的父親John Goring II24歲，母親Margaret Radmylde22歲。他於1464年與Joan Hewster在英國英格蘭素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨被列為lord of the manor of burton。他去世於1496年享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Goring III于1448年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特伯頓时，他的父亲John Goring II24岁，母亲Margaret Radmylde22岁。他于1464年与Joan Hewster在英国英格兰素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨被列为lord of the manor of burton。他去世于1496年享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Goring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places in Oxfordshire and West Sussex named Goring, from Old English Gāringas ‘people of Gāra’, a short form of various compound names with the first element gār ‘spear’.

variants.name: Goering
meanings: topographic name derived from Slavic gora ‘mountain, hill’. Compare Goring .

variants.name: Gorringe
meanings: English (Surrey and Suffolk): variant of   Goring  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Goring III was born in 1448, in Burton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Goring II, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Radmylde, was 22. He married Joan Hewster in 1464, in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. His occupation is listed as lord of the manor of burton in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1496, at the age of 48.

fr.Burton with Coates, Fittleworth, Sussex,: Burton with Coates, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Goring III est né en 1448, à Burton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Goring II, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Radmylde, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joan Hewster en 1464, à Burton with Coates, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est lord of the manor of burton à Burton with Coates, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1496, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.Burton with Coates, Fittleworth, Sussex,: Burton with Coates, Sussex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Goring III 1448 in Burton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Goring II 24 und seine Mutter Margaret Radmylde 22. Er hat 1464 in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Joan Hewster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als lord of the manor of burton in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb 1496 im Alter von 48 Jahren.

it.Burton with Coates, Fittleworth, Sussex,: Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando John Goring III è nato il nel 1448 nel Burton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Goring II, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Radmylde, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Joan Hewster nel 1464, nel Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come lord of the manor of burton nel Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1496, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Goring IIIが1448年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトブルトンで生まれた時，父John Goring IIは24歳，母Margaret Radmyldeは22歳であった。1464年にイギリスイギリススセックスブルトン ウィス コアツでJoan Hewsterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリススセックスブルトン ウィス コアツでの職業はlord of the manor of burtonと記録されている。彼は1496年に48歳で死去した。

ko.Burton with Coates, Fittleworth, Sussex,: 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 버턴 위스 코츠
ko.lifeSummary: John Goring III(이)가 1448년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Goring II(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Radmylde(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1464년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 버턴 위스 코츠에서 Joan Hewster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 버턴 위스 코츠에서 lord of the manor of burton이었다. 그는 1496년 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Goring III nasceu em 1448, em Burton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Goring II, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Radmylde, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Hewster em 1464, em Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como lord of the manor of burton em Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1496, com 48 anos.

ru.Burton with Coates, Fittleworth, Sussex,: буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Goring III родился в 1448 г. в местности буртон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Goring II было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Radmylde, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Hewster в 1464 г. в местности буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии lord of the manor of burton в местности буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1496 г. в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Goring III nació en 1448, en Burton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Goring II, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret Radmylde, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Joan Hewster en 1464, en Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era lord of the manor of burton en Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1496, a la edad de 48 años.
